regulations.name: Energy Efficiency Act (EnEfG)
regulations.summary: Requires data centers >500kW to report PUE annually. New DCs must achieve PUE ≤1.3 by 2030.
regulations.relevance: Directly regulates cooling efficiency targets and waste heat reuse

regulations.name: Federal Water Act (WHG)
regulations.summary: Regulates water extraction and discharge. Evaporative cooling requires permits.
regulations.relevance: Liquid cooling with water circuits requires permits under WHG
